above.description: The subject is vertically higher than the object, with the two entities separated or layered in image space.

across.description: The subject spans, crosses, or moves from one side of the object or region to another.

against.description: The subject is pressed near or in contact with the object, often leaning on or touching its surface.

along.description: The subject follows the direction, boundary, or extent of the object or scene region.

and.description: The subject and object are jointly present as an associated pair without a more specific visual interaction.

at.description: The subject is located at or directed toward the object, place, or target region.

attached to.description: The subject is physically fastened, joined, or connected to the object.

behind.description: The subject is farther back than the object in depth ordering or partially hidden by it.

belonging to.description: The subject is visually associated with the object as something owned, carried, or possessed by it.

between.description: The subject lies in the spatial interval separating other objects or parts of a region.

carrying.description: The subject supports and transports the object, typically through hand, body, or vehicle contact.

covered in.description: The subject surface is visibly covered by many instances, material, texture, or markings from the object.

covering.description: The subject lies over or occludes the object, hiding part of the object from view.

eating.description: The subject consumes or bites the object, usually involving mouth contact and edible affordance.

flying in.description: The subject is airborne within a scene region or container-like area.

for.description: The subject is intended for, used for, or visually directed toward the object or purpose.

from.description: The subject originates at, moves away from, or is visually sourced from the object or region.

growing on.description: The subject is a plant-like or natural part emerging from and attached to the object surface.

hanging from.description: The subject is suspended below the object by an attachment or support point.

has.description: The object is a visible part, attribute, or possessed component of the subject.

holding.description: The subject grasps or supports the object, usually with hands or a similar manipulator.

in.description: The subject is located inside the object, region, or enclosing space.

in front of.description: The subject is closer to the viewer than the object in depth ordering.

laying on.description: The subject is reclined or spread on the object surface with supporting contact.

looking at.description: The subject directs its gaze or visual attention toward the object.

lying on.description: The subject lies horizontally on the object or surface with visible support.

made of.description: The subject is composed of the material or substance denoted by the object.

mounted on.description: The subject is fixed onto the object surface or support structure.

near.description: The subject is spatially close to the object without necessarily touching it.

of.description: The subject is semantically or visually associated with the object as a part, attribute, or possession.

on.description: The subject is located on the object surface, often with contact, support, or attachment.

on back of.description: The subject is positioned on the back side or dorsal surface of the object.

over.description: The subject is above or spanning over the object, often without direct contact.

painted on.description: The subject is a visual mark, image, or color pattern applied to the object surface.

parked on.description: The subject vehicle or movable object is stationary on a supporting surface or region.

part of.description: The subject is a visible component or subregion belonging to the object.

playing.description: The subject engages with the object in a play, sport, or recreational action.

riding.description: The subject sits, stands, or balances on the object while using it for transport or support.

says.description: The subject displays text, symbols, or readable markings corresponding to the object.

sitting on.description: The subject is seated on the object surface with body support.

standing on.description: The subject stands upright on the object or surface with weight-bearing contact.

to.description: The subject is directed toward the object as a destination, target, or endpoint.

under.description: The subject is vertically lower than and beneath the object.

using.description: The subject manipulates or operates the object as a tool or functional item.

walking in.description: The subject walks within a region, space, or containing scene area.

walking on.description: The subject walks across or on top of a supporting surface.

watching.description: The subject visually attends to the object or event over time.

wearing.description: The subject has the object attached to or covering its body as clothing or an accessory.

wears.description: The subject wears the object on its body as clothing, equipment, or an accessory.

with.description: The subject appears together with the object in a broad visual association.
